findings.issue: All 7 skill/asset links in task 10 use incorrect relative depth '../../skills/' which resolves to 'work/skills/' (does not exist). Correct depth from 'work/design-pipeline/tasks/' is '../../../skills/'. Affected links: security-auditor/SKILL.md (Required Skills + Context), design-system-init/SKILL.md, design-generate/SKILL.md, design-review/SKILL.md, design-retrospective/SKILL.md, do-task/SKILL.md, design-generate/assets/preview-template.html.
findings.fix: Replace all '../../skills/' with '../../../skills/' in task 10.md. Compare with task 11 and task 12 which correctly use '../../../skills/'.

findings.issue: Task 11 instructs the agent to write its audit report to 'decisions.md' (a shared feature-level file), while task 9 writes to 'logs/working/task-9/code-audit-report.json' and task 10 writes to 'logs/working/task-10/security-audit.md'. The pattern is inconsistent: task 11 pollutes the shared decisions file with a large test audit report instead of using a dedicated log file. Additionally, task 12 expects to consume the Test Audit report from '../logs/working/task-11/' — but that directory will not be created if task 11 writes to decisions.md.
findings.fix: Change task 11 output location to 'logs/working/task-11/test-audit-report.md' (or .json), consistent with tasks 9 and 10. Keep decisions.md Post-completion entry as the brief summary only. Update step 6 and all AC references accordingly.

findings.issue: Task 12 references '[Test Audit report](../logs/working/task-11/)' in Context Files, expecting a file at work/design-pipeline/logs/working/task-11/. However, task 11 (as written) writes its report to decisions.md, not to that directory. This will cause task 12 to fail to locate the test audit report.
findings.fix: This finding is resolved together with the task 11 fix: once task 11 is corrected to write to logs/working/task-11/, the task 12 reference will resolve correctly. No change needed in task 12 itself.

findings.issue: Step 9 specifies the QA report output as 'logs/working/qa-report.json' without a full feature-relative prefix. All other task output paths in this feature use full paths (e.g., 'work/design-pipeline/logs/working/task-10/security-audit.md'). The ambiguity could cause the agent to write the file relative to its cwd rather than to the feature directory.
findings.fix: Change to explicit path: 'work/design-pipeline/logs/working/qa-report.json' or use the feature-relative form 'work/design-pipeline/logs/working/task-12/qa-report.json' for consistency with other audit tasks.

notes.future_files: Tasks 10, 11, 12 all reference files created by tasks 3-8 (design-system-init/SKILL.md, design-generate/SKILL.md, etc.) and task 1 (shared/design-references/). These do not yet exist in the codebase. This is expected given wave ordering and is NOT flagged as a finding.
notes.task10_depends_on: depends_on: [3,4,5,6,7,8] is correct — covers all tasks that create the files to be audited.
notes.task11_depends_on: depends_on: [3,4,5,6,7,8] is correct — covers all tasks that create the SKILL.md files to be audited.
notes.task12_depends_on: depends_on: [9,10,11] is correct — Final Wave depends on all Audit Wave tasks.
notes.task11_scenario_count: 22 scenarios total (6+7+4+5) matches the tech-spec. No discrepancy.
notes.task10_security_coverage: Security vectors (prompt injection, path traversal, XSS/CSP, unsafe commands, information disclosure) are well-defined and concrete. Audit scope is appropriate.
notes.task12_ac_count: Task 12 lists 13 acceptance criteria matching tech-spec exactly. Coverage is complete.
